autocorrelation.identification_hint: both tail off -> suggests ARMA; fit by AIC over a small (p,q) grid

stl_at_dominant.reference: Cleveland, Cleveland, McRae & Terpenning 1990, J. Official Statistics 6(1):3-73 (STL)

hurst.reference: Hurst 1951, Trans. ASCE 116:770-799 (R/S); Peng et al. 1994, Phys. Rev. E 49:1685-1689 (DFA)

rqa.reference: Eckmann, Kamphorst & Ruelle 1987, DOI 10.1209/0295-5075/4/9/004; Marwan et al. 2007, DOI 10.1016/j.physrep.2006.11.001

nonlinear.verdict_note: chaos claimed only when Lyapunov>0 AND 0-1 K>0.5 AND surrogate rejects linearity
